prompt: How do I create a commitment in this app?

score.finalText:
I don’t have a help article for **creating a commitment** yet.

What the help center does confirm is the general pattern: **select the project first**, then work inside the project-specific tool. The commitment workflow itself just isn’t documented in the published app help right now.

What I can tell you:
- Commitments in this app are your **subcontracts and purchase orders**
- They’re **project-specific**
- You should start by opening the **correct project** first

Likely workflow in the app:
1. Select the project in the header.
2. Open the project’s **Commitments** or **Procurement/Cost** area.
3. Choose **New Commitment**.
4. Pick the type:
   - **Subcontract**
   - **Purchase Order**
5. Enter the vendor, scope/title, contract/PO number if required, schedule of values or amount, and status.
6. Save, then route for whatever approval process your team uses.

What’s missing:
- I can’t confirm the exact menu label, field sequence, or approval flow from the current help docs.
- There also isn’t a published action in app help that lets me walk you through it step-by-step from a controlled article.

Best next move:
- If you want, I can help two ways:
  1. **Find the exact workflow** by searching project/process documentation and prior discussions, or
  2. **Draft feedback** that says “Create Commitment needs a help article,” so this gets documented properly.

If you want the practical version, I can also give you a **field-by-field checklist for creating a subcontract or PO** so your team enters it cleanly the first time.

results.title: Create or Invite a User
results.description: Add an app user from User Management and explain how the invited person finishes login setup.

actionCapabilities.label: Invite user
actionCapabilities.description: Prepare and send an invitation for a new Alleato OS user from User Management.
actionCapabilities.unavailableReason: The assistant can explain the invitation flow, but the invite-user write tool is not implemented yet.

results.excerpt: Create or Invite a User New users are added from User Management. In the current workflow, an administrator creates the user record, chooses the user's access, and sends an invitation email. The invited person accepts the invitation and creates their own password. The user's email address is their username. There is no separate username to give them. Steps 1. Open User Management. 2. Stay on the **App Users** tab. 3.

results.title: Find Project Documents and Drawings
results.description: Locate project documents, drawings, drawing sets, and drawing revisions.
results.excerpt: Find Project Documents and Drawings Documents and drawings are project-specific. Select the right project first, then open the document or drawing tool for that project. Find Documents 1. Select the project in the header. 2. Open Documents. 3. Search, filter, or sort the document list. 4. Open the document record to review details or download files when available. Find Drawings 1. Select the project in the header. 2.

results.title: Ask the AI Assistant for Help
results.description: Use Ask Alleato when you need help finding information or understanding how to use the platform.
results.excerpt: Ask the AI Assistant for Help Use Ask Alleato when you need help finding information, understanding a workflow, or getting oriented inside the platform. The assistant can answer questions from available project data, help documentation, and approved knowledge sources. When an answer depends on data that is not indexed or a workflow that is not documented yet, it should say so plainly instead of guessing. Good Questio

results.title: Submit Feedback
results.description: Send feedback from inside the app when something is wrong, confusing, or missing.
results.excerpt: Submit Feedback Use feedback when something is wrong, confusing, missing, or worth improving. Clear feedback helps the internal team understand what you were doing and what needs attention. What To Include - What you expected to happen. - What actually happened. - The project, tool, or record you were using. - Any specific wording, number, file, or button that looked wrong. When Feedback Mode Is Available 1. Select t

results.title: Navigate Projects
results.description: Switch between projects, open the project home page, and find project tools.
results.excerpt: Navigate Projects Projects are the main workspace in Alleato OS. Most project tools use the selected project context, so confirm the right project before reviewing or changing project information. Switch Projects 1. Use **Select Project** in the header. 2. Search for the project by name or job number. 3. Select the project from the list. 4. Use View all projects if you need to browse the full project list. After you

memories.content: The user prefers detailed, specific updates on project status, risks, and next steps for Vermillion Rise Warehouse.
User prefers high-leverage, action-oriented tasks prioritized daily for Vermillion Rise Warehouse project.
User prefers to have tasks and RFIs associated with specific project names, due dates, and assignees documented clearly.
